<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# src/config

Defines schemas, defaults, and loading logic for `.agents-reverse-engineer/config.yaml`, providing all configuration primitives (exclude patterns, concurrency, compression, backend selection) consumed by the orchestration and generation layers.

## Contents

**[defaults.ts](./defaults.ts)** — exports `getDefaultConcurrency()` (cores-based calculation with memory cap), `DEFAULT_VENDOR_DIRS` (node_modules, dist, .git, .agents-reverse-engineer, .agents, .planning, .claude, .codex, .opencode, .gemini, target, .cargo, .gradle, venv, .venv, .next, __pycache__, build, vendor), `DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS` (AGENTS.md, AGENTS.override.md, CLAUDE.md, OPENCODE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.*.md, *.local.md, *.lock, package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml, bun.lock, bun.lockb, Gemfile.lock, Cargo.lock, poetry.lock, composer.lock, go.sum, .gitignore, .gitattributes, .env, **/.env.*, *.log, *.sum, **/*.sum, **/SKILL.md), `DEFAULT_BINARY_EXTENSIONS` (images: .png/.jpg/.jpeg/.gif/.bmp/.ico/.webp; archives: .zip/.tar/.gz/.rar/.7z; executables: .exe/.dll/.so/.dylib; media: .mp3/.mp4/.wav; documents: .pdf; fonts: .woff/.woff2/.ttf/.eot; compiled: .class/.pyc), `DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE` (1MB), `DEFAULT_COMPRESSION_RATIO` (0.25), `DEFAULT_CONFIG` object spreading all defaults.

**[schema.ts](./schema.ts)** — exports Zod schemas `ConfigSchema`, `ExcludeSchema`, `OptionsSchema`, `OutputSchema`, `GenerationSchema`, `AISchema` with inferred types (`Config`, `ExcludeConfig`, `OptionsConfig`, `OutputConfig`, `GenerationConfig`, `AIConfig`); fields include `compressionRatio` (0.1–1.0, default 0.25), `activeVariant` (string optional, set by --eval flag), `backend` (enum: claude|codex|gemini|opencode|auto, default auto), `model` (string, default "sonnet"), `timeoutMs` (300000), `maxRetries` (3), `concurrency` (1–20, default from getDefaultConcurrency()), `telemetry.keepRuns` (50), `followSymlinks` (false), `maxFileSize` (DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE), `colors` (true).

**[loader.ts](./loader.ts)** — exports `loadConfig()` (reads config.yaml, validates via ConfigSchema, applies defaults, emits `config:loaded` trace with configPath/model/concurrency fields, throws ConfigError on validation failure, returns defaults on ENOENT), `findProjectRoot()` (walks upward to locate `.agents-reverse-engineer/`), `configExists()`, `writeDefaultConfig()` (creates annotated template with backend/model auto-detection), `getDefaultBackendConfig()` (detects backends via registry with priority Claude > Codex > Gemini > OpenCode, falls back to auto/auto), `getDefaultModelForBackend()` (maps backend to default model), `ConfigError` class (with filePath and optional cause), `yamlScalar()` (quotes strings matching `/[*{}\[\]?,:#&!|>'"%@`]/`).

## Behavioral Contracts

**Trace Events**  
`config:loaded` — emitted by loadConfig() with fields `{ configPath, model, concurrency }`

**Debug Logs**  
`[debug] Config loaded from: <path>`  
`[debug] Model: <model>, Concurrency: <n>`  
`[debug] Config file not found, using defaults`

**Concurrency Calculation**  
`clamp(cores * CONCURRENCY_MULTIPLIER, MIN_CONCURRENCY, min(memCap, MAX_CONCURRENCY))` where cores from `os.availableParallelism()` or `os.cpus().length`, `memCap = floor(totalMemGB * MEMORY_FRACTION / SUBPROCESS_HEAP_GB)`.  
Constants: `CONCURRENCY_MULTIPLIER = 5`, `MIN_CONCURRENCY = 2`, `MAX_CONCURRENCY = 20`, `SUBPROCESS_HEAP_GB = 0.512`, `MEMORY_FRACTION = 0.5`

**Config Template Annotations**  
Compression ratio docs: `0.10 = very concise`, `0.25 = standard`, `0.50 = detailed`  
Backend options: `claude | codex | gemini | opencode | auto`  
Model aliases: `sonnet | opus | haiku | sonnet[1m] | opusplan` for Claude  
Full model IDs: claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929, claude-haiku-4-5, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.1-codex-max, gpt-5.1-codex, gpt-5-codex, gpt-5-codex-mini, gemini-3-pro-preview, gemini-3-flash-preview, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash

**Path Constants**  
`CONFIG_DIR = '.agents-reverse-engineer'`  
`CONFIG_FILE = 'config.yaml'`

**Backend Default Models**  
`BACKEND_DEFAULT_MODELS: Record<string, string>` — claude→sonnet, codex→gpt-5-codex-mini, gemini→gemini-3-flash-preview, opencode→anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5

## Integration Points

loadConfig() depends on ConfigSchema from `./schema.js`; schema.ts imports defaults from `./defaults.js` (DEFAULT_VENDOR_DIRS, DEFAULT_BINARY_EXTENSIONS, DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE, DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS, getDefaultConcurrency); loader.ts imports createBackendRegistry and detectAvailableBackends from `../ai/registry.js`, accepts ITraceWriter from `../orchestration/trace.js`, accepts Logger from `../core/logger.js`, uses nullLogger when logger not provided; ConfigError wraps Zod validation failures as `path.join('.'): message`; ENOENT triggers default config return; YAML parse errors wrapped in ConfigError; ConfigError instances re-thrown without wrapping.
